Notice Of Petition And Petition To Compel Arbitration Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Apr-08-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Melissa Huether, Esq. 818-265-1020 of Lawyers for Justice for Plaintiff through Court Call.
Sarah Zenewicz, Esq. 415-422-4810 of Ogletree Deakins for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court shares its views and asks re: request for dismissal. Both sides argue. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT THE REALREAL, INC.'s Petition To Compel Arbitration.

Off calendar. The Court will sign the request for dismissal as soon as it is not pending on efiling. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/EPS).
